landing.title: Slite | AI-powered knowledge base
landing.text:
Slite | AI-powered knowledge base
We value your privacy
This website or its third-party tools process personal data. You can opt out of the sale of your personal information by clicking on the “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” link.
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Opt-out Preferences
We use third-party cookies that help us analyze how you use this website, store your preferences, and provide the content and advertisements that are relevant to you. However, you can opt out of these cookies by checking "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" and clicking the "Save My Preferences" button. Once you opt out, you can opt in again at any time by unchecking "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" and clicking the "Save My Preferences" button.
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Cancel
Save My Preferences
Your opt-out preference has been honored.

Your knowledge base + enterprise search, finally working together
Where knowledge

thrives
Skip the software learning curve: Slite delivers beautiful documentation, hassle-free adoption, and AI-powered search from day one.
Start for free
Book a demo
"
For company Wiki, this is the best.
"
Filippo Laita
Senior People Partner at Klarx
"
The editing interface and document structure are SO simple and useful. It's been the best Knowledge Base experience we've had.
"
Martijn Hazelaar
CTO at Flexdealer
4,7/5
on G2 Crowd
4,7/5
on Capterra
4,9/5
on ProductHunt
3,000+ leading companies trust Slite as their single source of truth.
Knowledge bases get messy. Slite doesn't.
Document verification system with automated reminders
Knowledge Management for bulk operations
AI-suggested actions to maintain quality
Ownership transfer when team members leave
Docs that work for everyone
Engineering
HR
Operations
Sales
Support
Browse all templates
Engineering
Technical documentation
Project documentation
QA Template
Software documentation
Centralized, Always-Current Playbooks
Slite keeps every workflow, policy, and operational detail up-to-date and one search away so hand-offs are simple.
Confident Audits and Handovers
No more scrambling for documents. Everything’s organized, accessible, and ready for compliance reviews.
What's the use of knowledge if you can't find it?
Ask
transforms scattered knowledge into instant answers, delivering the right information in seconds.
Powered by verified, trusted documentation
Based on info each user has access to
Speaks your language
Ask is part of all our paid plans, at no extra cost
“Since we implemented
Ask
, that amount of questions has been divided by 10, and it's really amazing because everyone is able to get the information they need.”
Alexis Dupont, Principal Product at Agorapulse
Knowledge Suite
Ask beyond Slite,
across all your tools
Our Knowledge Suite plan combines Slite's Knowledge base with world's best company search and orchestration solution, at discounted price.
Meet Super. The ultimate way to find any data across all your tools, reduce questions from your teammate, automate complex workflows and power your agents' context retrieval.
Explore Super
Trusted by teams like yours
75% faster
team onboarding
Everybody on the team adapted quickly to Slite and actively uses it. The software is highly intuitive, with frequent updates that delight the entire team!
Daniel Hanemann
CEO & Founder at Wundertax
Slite helped us significantly reduce escalation times by making our documentation easy to find, always up-to-date, and accessible to everyone. It's become the single source of truth for our company.
Miguel Herrero
Product Manager at PVCase
3x more
productive team meeting
Our team has grown from 250 people to over 700 in the last year, across different offices. Slite supports our fast growth by giving us a structured place to route people when they have questions.
Josselin Raguenet de Saint Albin
Head of Customer Service at Meero
Slite transformed how we manage knowledge. It's the perfect balance between simplicity and power - intuitive enough for everyone to use, yet robust enough to handle all our documentation needs.
Thomas D'Hoe
Chief Operating Officer at Premium Plus
90% fewer
repeated questions
The Slite edge, in our customer words
Leveraging AI for growth
Switched from Tettra & Google Docs
Sebastien Gendreau
Head of Product at Agora Pulse
Case study
Scaling global teams
Switched from five tools
Martijn Hazelaar
Digital Manager at Vanmoof
Case study
Scales with your ambitions
Slite’s Enterprise plan gives organizations the security, control, and flexibility they need to scale knowledge-sharing with confidence. From compliance and analytics to tailored onboarding and support, it’s designed to meet the needs of growing teams.
security
SSO Integration
Enable secure, seamless access with single sign-on (SSO) through providers like Okta, Google Workspace, and Azure AD.
security
Advanced provisioning
Automate user lifecycle management with SCIM provisioning for faster, safer onboarding and offboarding.
customization
Personalized onboarding
Kickstart adoption with onboarding tailored to your workflows, guided by our customer success team.
customization
Reader-only roles
Share knowledge broadly while maintaining control by assigning read-only access to specific users.
compliance
SOC 2 type II compliance
Meet rigorous security standards with SOC II Type II certification, ensuring enterprise-grade data protection.
customization
HIPAA compliance
Option to execute a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) to ensure HIPAA-compliant infrastructure with encryption, access controls, and breach notification support for Protected Health Information.
compliance
GDPR compliance
Operate confidently across regions with GDPR-compliant practices that safeguard data privacy.
customization
SLA
Count on guaranteed uptime and response times with a service-level agreement built for enterprise reliability.
customization
Dedicated support
Access priority, hands-on support from specialists who understand your team’s needs.
control
Analytics
Measure adoption and engagement with usage insights to keep your documentation effective.
control
Backups
Protect your knowledge base with automated backups and fast recovery when needed.
security
Granular permissions
Control access at every level with flexible, detailed permissions for teams and projects.
control
Audit logs
Maintain accountability with complete visibility into who accessed and modified content.
Your success is our priority
Dedicated support when needed
Thriving product community
Live Q&A sessions and expert best practices
Tailored, one-on-one onboarding
Direct access to the Slite team, every step of the way
Book a demo
Start for free
We're super impressed with your support team, how fast and efficient they are in replying to all of their questions.
Katsiaryna Karliuk
Project & Change Manager at Enteractive
As always, very swift response from the team with the fix exactly as requested.
Oskar Grochowalski
CEO at Remote Sensei
We're really grateful for the partnership we've built with Slite.
Jill Ferrie
Learning & Development Manager at GrandPad
The knowledge base everyone will actually use.
4,7/5
on G2 Crowd

on Capterra

on ProductHunt

They say it better than we do.
Oskar Grochowalski
CEO at Remote Sensei
As always, very swift response from the support team with the fix exactly as requested. We are grateful for the product you created and the service you provide.
Roman Kuba
VP Engineering at Tset
I can't imagine dealing with all the content we've produced without the Knowledge Management Panel anymore. It's a life-saver, letting us perform bulk actions and eliminating the need to go over every single doc manually.
Katsiaryna Karliuk
Project & Change Manager at Enteractive
We're super impressed with your support team, how fast and efficient they are in replying to all of their questions.
Pierre Andre
Co-Founder at WeCasa
We tried to build our internal knowledge base before, but the search never worked so nobody could find anything. Slite has completely turned that around, and that changes everything.
Nina Warnecke
Learning Designer at NELE
Thank you so much for the quick help, nice communication and support at all times.
Martijn Hazelaar
Chief Technical Officer at Salonized
We're growing fast, so ease of adoption is crucial for any new solution - we can't afford to turn back. Slite has proven extremely friendly, for all of our users.
Eric Fettner
Chief Operations Officer at The Job Sauce
Perfect example of a product delivering on the 80/20 rule: you give the top 20% that gets 80% done. No fluff, it's simple.
Claire Villet
Operations Manager at Displayce
Ask has been incredible, it's simplified information gathering for the whole team. We've eliminated the endless 'How does X work' and 'Where can I find Y' messages, saving everyone tons of time.
Frequently Asked Questions
How does the 14 days free trial work?
Once you sign up to Slite, your 14 day free trial beings. During this period you can test out the capabilities of the product and everything that's included in the Standard plan before purchasing one of our plans. You'll have the option to book a demo with one of our Slite experts at any point during the trial.
What happens after the Free Trial has ended?
Once the 14 day free trial has ended, you will see a message that purchasing one of our subscription plans is necessary to continue using Slite. You'll need to be a workspace admin to purchase a plan.
What happened to the Premium plan?
We deprecated the premium plan in favor of the Knowledge Suite (Knowledge base + Enterprise Search). If you're an existing Premium customer, you can continue to renew your plan at the same price. If you have any questions, please reach out to support@slite.com.
Do you offer discounts for non-profit and academic organizations?
Yes, we do offer discounts to eligible non-profit or academic organizations on the Standard plan. Contact support@slite.com to redeem this offer.
Can I add extra members to the workspace and how are these billed?
You can add extra users to your workspace directly in the product. If you are on our monthly plan, these extra users will be billed on your next invoice. If you are on our yearly plan, we will prorate the costs. We'll review the number of members each month on the day you have started your subscription. If the number of users is higher than your current baseline, we will prorate the extra licenses and bill you for the remaining months on your contract.
What happens if I remove members from the account?
At any time you can remove users from your account. When you remove a user, this frees up a license that can be used by someone else. If you do not assign the license to someone else, the lower number of licenses will be reflected on your renewal invoice.
Is Slite HIPAA compliant?
Yes, we’re HIPAA compliant and can sign a BAA for eligible plans. To learn more about how we protect healthcare data, get in touch with our
sales team
.
Try Slite today
Get your team set up in minutes, not weeks.
Get Slite for free
Book a demo
Get the ultimate Knowledge base + Company search combo.
Slite also offers Super, our AI search finding answers across your entire tech stack. Get the perfect toolset for Knowledge work at reduced price.
Learn more
Book a demo
The knowledge base everyone will actually use.

changelog.title: What's new in Slite
changelog.text:
What's new in Slite
Product
Features
Learn how Slite works
Documents
Try our Editor live
Ask
Use AI to ask your knowledge base questions
Templates
Explore the library
Integrations
See how Slite integrates with your existing tools
Download app
Available on Mac, Windows, iOS and Android
Solutions
Knowledge Suite
New
IT & Operations
Product & Engineering
Human Resources
Customer Support
Pricing
Resources
Resources hub
A library of guides, tools and more
Learn
Dive into all things knowledge management
Blog
Readings about the future of team knowledge
Help center
Advice and answers from the Slite Team
Sign in
Book a demo
Start for free
Slite Changelog
Our latest updates and improvements
Follow us on Linkedin
Follow us on X
Join the community
May 20, 2026
See every change, and know who made it
The doc history view has been completely reworked. Changes are now highlighted at the block level and down to individual words, with clear attribution to the person or agent, who made each edit. A minimap lets you jump to any section of a long doc without scrolling, and the footer has been simplified into a floating bar. The history slider now correctly starts at the document's initial state.
Super is now inside Slite
If your workspace has both Slite and Super, you can now use Super directly from the Slite sidebar, no switching apps. Ask questions, search across all your connected tools, and get answers without leaving your docs.
Slite + Super customers
: Super is now fully accessible inside the Slite app.
Slite-only customers
: Nothing changes for you.
Super-only customers
: You'll notice some small UX and naming updates, but nothing major.
Not on Super yet? As a Slite customer, you get a discounted plan.
Book a demo →
MCP: hybrid format for everyone, plus wide layout support
Hybrid SliteML is now live for all users. Slite MCP now accepts operations in either standard Markdown or our rich SliteML format, adapting intelligently to each — so AI models can write in whichever they prefer, and Slite handles both. Token usage dropped significantly since the MCP only returns edited ranges, and a new
read_range
tool lets agents fetch just what they need. Tables work better, and
create-note
/
update-note
now support
contentWidth
for wide layouts.
See what's possible →
Smarter admin: better exports and silent sharing
CSV exports now include
Has Super Seat
and
User Group
.
You can share a doc without notifying recipients.
SCIM provisioning is now available for all Enterprise plan customers.
Starting with Okta, with Azure AD and Google Workspace support coming. New hires get access automatically, role changes sync, and leavers lose access the moment they're removed from your IdP. No more manual seat management.
Reach out to get enabled.
Other improvements
Faster document switching — up to ~4× faster (from ~100ms to ~25ms) (shipped with the April 9 cycle, now fully rolled out)
create-note
no longer prompts agents to repeat the document title as an H1 heading in the body
Fixes
Fixed a crash when deleting rows from a large table containing images
Fixed document content appearing to disappear after moving a page between channels
Fixed scrolling from the scrollbar being blocked when the right sidebar was open
Fixed clicking between collapsible sections jumping the document back to the top
Fixed the Linear integration hitting rate limits when embedding Linear issues in docs
Fixed an authorization error that prevented adding the Slite MCP to ChatGPT
May 6, 2026
New boxed layout
You may have noticed something feels different in Slite. The main content area now sits in a white box surrounded by lighter sidebars, giving Slite a cleaner, more focused look. Search and Ask are now regular sidebar row items, a small change that sets the stage for bigger things coming in June. The layout adapts cleanly to mobile, and the sidebar shell has been unified across Slite and Super so both products share the same design primitives going forward.
Comments redesigned
Comments now appear in document order.
A new
Unread
tab makes it easy to catch up.
Notification emails now show the highlighted text that was commented on.
If you @-mention someone who doesn't have access to the doc, you'll get a warning before it goes out.
And you can now create, resolve, reply to comments through our MCP.
More MCP tools: comment creation and channel management
Building on last cycle's comment reading and resolving, the MCP now supports the full comment workflow:
Create and reply to comment threads
directly via MCP. Threads can be left global or anchored inline to a specific span of text, just like in the editor.
Two new channel tools:
create-channel
(public, private, or read-only, with an optional icon) and
update-channel
(rename, change icon, or update visibility).
Other improvements
Member CSV export now includes User Groups and Super Seat columns for easier team audits.
Admins can now skip sending notifications when sharing a doc, a toggle in the share role selector lets you silently add someone without pinging them.
The MCP now accepts icon shapes and colors in
create-note
and
update-note
, so agents can set custom icons without opening the UI.
Exporting untitled docs to Markdown no longer creates a hidden
.md
file, it now exports as
untitled.md
.
Markdown backup ZIP files now emit valid YAML front matter (the opening
---
delimiter was previously missing).
Bug fixes
Fixed a crash when dragging content below an empty collapsed heading.
Fixed cut/paste not working correctly between table cells for date and special cell types.
Fixed links and doc cards breaking when copy-pasted between docs.
Fixed Cmd+click in the search modal loading a doc twice.
Fixed a backspace crash when a heading followed a table inside a collapsible block.
Fixed the mobile toolbar not being able to insert Hints or Quotes.
Fixed collapsed heading icons not being visible due to a CSS specificity regression.
Fixed resolving a comment switching the sidebar to the Resolved pane unexpectedly.
Fixed the seats banner showing "0 Readers" on plans that don't include the reader role.
Fixed the right sidebar switching unexpectedly when a global comment was focused.
Fixed corrupted collection cells caused by stale local operations being re-submitted.
Apr 22, 2026
MCP: Read and resolve comment threads
Slite's MCP integration now exposes comment threads on documents. Any MCP client — Claude, Cursor, your own agent — can now:
List all threads
on a note, with full comment history, participants, and resolved state
Fetch a specific thread
by ID, or by note + thread ID together
Resolve or unresolve
a thread programmatically
This opens up powerful agentic workflows: an AI can now read the discussion context on a design doc, triage open threads, or mark resolved ones as done — without any human having to open the document first.
Find in Collections
Cmd+F now matches text inside collection cells — for both embedded collections and standalone collection docs. Results are interleaved with regular text matches in document order, so next/previous navigation walks the full page top-to-bottom. Note: Replace is text-only; collection matches are navigated but not replaceable.
Other improvements
Visual polish across the editor:
inline code has a higher border radius, hints have a softer style with a light border, and tabs components have been redesigned. Links inside inline comments are now clickable, and deleted content in comments shows strikethrough.
Better comment experience:
Comment layout is more dense, the inline mark for resolved comments is now visible in the editor, and the resolved/open tab bar is now sticky.
Subdoc creation on shared docs:
users with write access on a "Shared with me" doc can now create subdocuments directly from that doc, without needing access to the parent channel.
Billing: incomplete subscription banner:
if your workspace has an incomplete Stripe subscription, a banner now appears on the billing screen with a direct "Complete payment" action.
Verification events now appear in doc history:
Verification changes now show up in the document history timeline, so you can see exactly when a doc was confirmed accurate and by whom.
Fixes
Long team or user group names now truncate with an ellipsis in the verification owner menu and the Knowledge Management Panel owner filter — no more overflow.
The public share settings panel now stays open when a document is already publicly shared, so the sharing state is always visible.
Going back after a search no longer re-triggers navigation to the same search query.
Links opened from the in-app changelog now open in a new tab on the desktop app.
Apr 8, 2026
Multi-Column Layouts
You can now place content side by side in your docs. Type
/column
to pick up to 4 columns, or drag existing blocks next to each other — no command needed. Columns are great for comparing options, building compact summaries, or giving long documents a more structured and scannable layout. Layouts adapt to mobile viewports too, so your docs look great wherever your team reads them.
Read more about how to use columns in Slite
Knowledge Management Panel
The Knowledge Management Panel has been completely rewritten from the ground up. You can now:
Export any view as a CSV
— perfect for large audits where you need to divide work across a team.
Sort by
last activity
and
view count
is now available, so you can surface stale or high-traffic docs at a glance.
Collections are now included in the panel, selected channels and users appear at the top of filters for faster navigation, and the overall responsiveness of the list has been significantly improved.
The Knowledge Management Panel is also now accessible via the
Public API
and
MCP
, letting you build automations on top of your knowledge health data.
Inline LaTeX Formulas
You can now use inline formulas in docs using the
/formula inline
command. This is a long-requested feature for technical documentation, easily mix text and math in the same line. Exports now include inline formulas too.
Improvements
Faster doc switching — switching between documents is up to ~4× faster (from ~100ms to ~25ms)
Remote cursor reliability improved — cursors no longer fade out prematurely
Improved formula UX:
$...$
markdown shortcut for inline formulas, with fluid keyboard navigation
Fixes
Collections now appear in the Knowledge Management Panel
Billing page improvements: renewal date no longer shown after cancellation, past invoices fully accessible, and switching from monthly to yearly plan is possible again
Fixed the AI editor shortcut on Windows (
Ctrl+Shift+I
)
Search now expands collapsed blocks when a match is found inside them
Cut/paste works from inside collapsible sections
Comment popover no longer gets cut off at the end of a doc
Replying to inline table comments now works reliably
Copy-pasting images between notes no longer shows broken images before reload
Doc card cover images now render correctly
Using the "New doc" command in the editor no longer triggers a blue error banner
Deleting archived docs now works correctly with proper permission checks
API markdown updates no longer remove tables from documents
Image captions now persist after using
modify-block
via MCP
Ask no longer ignores the
parentNoteId
filter
MCP update-note tool no longer destroys collection data when replacing note content
Note title updates via API are now truncated to 255 characters
Mentions no longer disappear during heavy collaborative editing
User list scroll position no longer resets in Member Management
Mar 16, 2026
Slite Ask, now powered by the Super engine
Ask has been upgraded to run on the same AI engine that powers
Super
. This brings a significant improvement in answer quality, reliability, and speed.
Answers are more accurate and more consistent
Ask is now available on public docs
No custom API key required — Ask uses our optimized setup by default
The experience has been refreshed with a new UI closer to Super's
In-editor AI features: rebuilt from the ground up
All AI features accessible from the editor toolbar have been rebuilt with a new backend.
The AI now understands every block and content type in your docs — tables, hints, diagrams, lists, and more
Rewrites, summaries, and suggestions are more accurate and better fit the structure of your content
Redesigned billing settings page
The billing settings page has been completely redesigned for a cleaner, more intuitive experience.
All billing information in one screen
Clearly shows seat counts for Slite, Super, or both
Faster access to subscription details and payment management
Enhanced Slite MCP
The Slite MCP server has been significantly expanded with new tools and capabilities.
New tools:
move-note
— Move documents to reorganize your workspace
update-note
— Update document titles and content
archive-note
and
restore-note
— Archive and restore docs
create-collection
and
update-collection
— Create and manage Collections
VerificationExpired review state now exposed in API and MCP
Change tracking:
MCP edits are now tracked in document history with a bot icon indicator
Easily identify which changes were made via MCP versus manual edits
Learn how to set up ↗
Sketches & Mermaid Diagrams in PDF exports
Sketch and Mermaid Diagrams elements are now included when exporting docs to PDF — so your visual annotations, drawings and diagrams make it into the final export.
Improvements
Video player fullscreen functionality improved using native Fullscreen API
Comments and block action gutters hidden on small screens for better mobile experience
Multiple date variables now supported in document titles
Usage analytics now includes Slack Ask queries
Knowledge Suite teams can now control who has Super seats
API keys now support read/write scopes
Fixes
Fixed hint and quote blocks not being linkable
Fixed table copy/paste creating ID conflicts
Fixed Linear tiles sometimes showing blank content
Fixed sketch color picker crashing documents
Fixed missing answers in Ask not b

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.text:
Integrations
We value your privacy
This website or its third-party tools process personal data. You can opt out of the sale of your personal information by clicking on the “Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information” link.
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Opt-out Preferences
We use third-party cookies that help us analyze how you use this website, store your preferences, and provide the content and advertisements that are relevant to you. However, you can opt out of these cookies by checking "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" and clicking the "Save My Preferences" button. Once you opt out, you can opt in again at any time by unchecking "Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information" and clicking the "Save My Preferences" button.
Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Information
Cancel
Save My Preferences
Your opt-out preference has been honored.
Banner closes automatically in

analysis.name: Slite
analysis.value_proposition: A team knowledge base with AI-powered search and document verification that eliminates repeated questions and keeps documentation current.
analysis.ideal_customer: Operations, HR, CS, and engineering teams at 50–1000-person companies that need a structured, always-current internal wiki with AI Q&A to reduce support load.

features.name: collaborative editor
features.description: Rich-text document editor with AI writing assistance built in
features.evidence_quote: Collaborative editor with AI built-in

features.name: ai search (ask)
features.description: AI Q&A layer over the knowledge base that returns answers from verified docs
features.evidence_quote: Ask transforms scattered knowledge into instant answers, delivering the right information in seconds.

features.name: ask in slack
features.description: Query the Slite knowledge base directly from Slack
features.evidence_quote: Ask in Slack

features.name: document verification system
features.description: Marks docs as verified/stale and sends automated reminders to owners
features.evidence_quote: Document verification system with automated reminders

features.name: knowledge management panel
features.description: Bulk operations panel for managing large doc inventories
features.evidence_quote: I can't imagine dealing with all the content we've produced without the Knowledge Management Panel anymore.

features.name: ai-suggested content actions
features.description: AI surfaces recommended actions to maintain knowledge base quality
features.evidence_quote: AI-suggested actions to maintain quality

features.name: ownership transfer
features.description: Reassign doc ownership automatically when team members depart
features.evidence_quote: Ownership transfer when team members leave

features.name: doc history
features.description: Version history with block-level diff, word-level attribution, and minimap navigation
features.evidence_quote: Changes are now highlighted at the block level and down to individual words, with clear attribution to the person or agent

features.name: doc insights
features.description: Per-document analytics (views, engagement)
features.evidence_quote: Doc insights

features.name: workspace analytics
features.description: Workspace-level usage and adoption analytics
features.evidence_quote: Workspace analytics

features.name: ask insights
features.description: Analytics on AI search queries to surface knowledge gaps
features.evidence_quote: Ask insights

features.name: scheduled recurring docs
features.description: Schedule documents to repeat on a cadence (e.g. weekly standup)
features.evidence_quote: Schedule recurring docs

features.name: custom templates
features.description: Create and share reusable document templates across the workspace
features.evidence_quote: Custom templates

features.name: template library
features.description: Pre-built templates for engineering, HR, ops, sales, and support
features.evidence_quote: Browse all templates — Engineering, HR, Operations, Sales, Support

features.name: public sharing with ai answers
features.description: Share docs publicly; visitors can use AI search on the public content
features.evidence_quote: Public sharing with AI answers

features.name: seo indexing for public docs
features.description: Public knowledge base pages are indexed by search engines
features.evidence_quote: SEO indexing for public docs

features.name: custom domain for public docs
features.description: Serve the public knowledge base under a custom domain
features.evidence_quote: Custom domain for public docs

features.name: access control
features.description: Granular permissions on channels and documents
features.evidence_quote: Access control

features.name: protect doc editing
features.description: Lock a document to prevent edits by non-owners
features.evidence_quote: Protect doc editing

features.name: guest collaborators
features.description: Invite external users to collaborate on specific docs
features.evidence_quote: Guest collaborators

features.name: reader role
features.description: Read-only role; doc-level on Standard/KS, workspace-level on Enterprise
features.evidence_quote: Reader role — At doc level / At doc level / Workspace level role available

features.name: user groups
features.description: Group users for bulk permission management
features.evidence_quote: User groups

features.name: admin channel controls
features.description: Admin controls over who can invite, share publicly, create channels, manage groups
features.evidence_quote: Control who can invite / Control public sharing / Control who can create channels

features.name: pdf/markdown/html export
features.description: Export documents to PDF, Markdown, or HTML
features.evidence_quote: PDF, Markdown, HTML exports

features.name: csv user export
features.description: Export workspace member list as CSV including user groups and Super seat info
features.evidence_quote: CSV exports now include Has Super Seat and User Group.

features.name: public api
features.description: REST API for programmatic access to docs and workspace data
features.evidence_quote: Public API

features.name: mcp (model context protocol) support
features.description: MCP server enabling AI agents to read, write, and manage Slite docs and channels
features.evidence_quote: Slite MCP now accepts operations in either standard Markdown or our rich SliteML format

features.name: chrome extension
features.description: Browser extension to capture and search Slite from Chrome
features.evidence_quote: Chrome extension

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps
features.evidence_quote: Available on Mac, Windows, iOS and Android

features.name: desktop apps
features.description: Native Mac and Windows desktop applications
features.evidence_quote: Available on Mac, Windows, iOS and Android

features.name: sso (openid)
features.description: OpenID single sign-on (Okta, Google Workspace, Azure AD supported)
features.evidence_quote: OpenID Single Sign-On (SSO)

features.name: scim provisioning
features.description: Automated user lifecycle management; new hires auto-provisioned, leavers deprovisioned
features.evidence_quote: SCIM provisioning is now available for all Enterprise plan customers. Starting with Okta

features.name: audit logs
features.description: Enterprise audit trail of workspace activity
features.evidence_quote: Audit log

features.name: soc 2 type ii compliance
features.description: SOC 2 Type II security certification
features.evidence_quote: SOC 2 Type II Compliance

features.name: hipaa compliance
features.description: HIPAA compliance for healthcare customers
features.evidence_quote: HIPAA

features.name: automatic data backups
features.description: Automated workspace data backups
features.evidence_quote: Automatic data back-ups

features.name: comments and mentions
features.description: Inline threaded comments with @mentions and notifications; Unread tab for catch-up
features.evidence_quote: Comments now appear in document order. A new Unread tab makes it easy to catch up.

features.name: silent sharing
features.description: Share a document with someone without triggering a notification
features.evidence_quote: You can share a doc without notifying recipients.

features.name: super integration (enterprise search)
features.description: Cross-tool enterprise search and AI workflow orchestration via embedded Super product
features.evidence_quote: Meet Super. The ultimate way to find any data across all your tools, reduce questions from your teammate

features.name: media embeds
features.description: Embed rich content from 40+ third-party tools directly in docs
features.evidence_quote: Media embeds

features.name: mermaid diagrams
features.description: Render Mermaid diagrams inline in documents
features.evidence_quote: Create visual representations on the fly in your Slite docs.

features.name: latex support
features.description: Insert LaTeX mathematical formulas inline in documents
features.evidence_quote: Insert mathematical formulas written in LaTeX language into your docs.

features.name: excalidraw integration
features.description: Collaborative hand-drawn diagrams embedded in docs
features.evidence_quote: Bring your docs to life with collaborative drawings.

features.name: custom welcome doc
features.description: Customize the workspace homepage document for new members
features.evidence_quote: Custom welcome doc

features.name: file attachments
features.description: Upload and attach files to documents; 200MB/file on Standard, unlimited on KS+
features.evidence_quote: File upload — Up to 200MB per file / Unlimited / Unlimited

features.name: personalized onboarding
features.description: Dedicated customer success-led onboarding tailored to team workflows
features.evidence_quote: Personalized onboarding

features.name: dedicated account manager
features.description: Named account manager for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Dedicated account manager

features.name: service level agreement
features.description: Contractual SLA for uptime and support response
features.evidence_quote: Service Level Agreement

features.name: priority support
features.description: Prioritized support queue for enterprise customers
features.evidence_quote: Priority support

features.name: confluence import/integration
features.description: Leverage Confluence content as a data source to power Ask responses
features.evidence_quote: Leverage Confluence data to enhance Slite's Ask responses.

features.name: slack integration
features.description: Search Slite and ask AI questions directly from Slack
features.evidence_quote: Search your Slite workspace from Slack and ask questions using Slite's AI assistant.

features.name: linear integration
features.description: Embed Linear issues directly in Slite documents
features.evidence_quote: Easily insert Linear issues into your Slite docs.

features.name: github integration
features.description: Embed GitHub issues and PRs in Slite documents
features.evidence_quote: Easily insert GitHub issues or PRs into your Slite docs.

features.name: jira integration
features.description: Embed Jira issues in Slite documents
features.evidence_quote: Easily insert Jira issues into your Slite docs.

features.name: figma integration
features.description: Embed live Figma designs in Slite docs
features.evidence_quote: Bring Figma designs into your Slite docs for streamlined teamwork.

features.name: notion integration
features.description: Use Notion as an external data source for Ask
features.evidence_quote: Expand your Slite experience with Notion as an external source.

features.name: google drive integration
features.description: Connect Google Drive to bring Drive content into the knowledge base
features.evidence_quote: Connect Google Drive to Slite to bring your Drive content into your knowledge base.

features.name: loom integration
features.description: Embed Loom video recordings in documents
features.evidence_quote: Enhance Slite docs with embedded Loom videos.

features.name: miro integration
features.description: Embed Miro whiteboards in Slite documents
features.evidence_quote: Seamlessly embed Miro boards in Slite docs.

features.name: draw.io integration
features.description: Embed professional flowcharts via draw.io
features.evidence_quote: Bring professional-looking flowcharts into your Slite documents.

features.name: lucidchart integration
features.description: Embed Lucidchart diagrams in documents
features.evidence_quote: Infuse your Slite docs with powerful visual explanations.

features.name: grain integration
features.description: Embed AI-powered meeting recordings from Grain
features.evidence_quote: Bring AI-powered meeting recordings from Grain into your Slite workspace.

features.name: metabase integration
features.description: Embed Metabase data visualizations in documents
features.evidence_quote: Bring your data to life with embedded Metabase visualizations in Slite.

features.name: permission-aware ai answers
features.description: AI search only surfaces content the querying user has permission to access
features.evidence_quote: Based on info each user has access to

features.name: mcp channel management
features.description: Create and update channels (public/private/read-only) via MCP for AI agents
features.evidence_quote: Two new channel tools: create-channel (public, private, or read-only) and update-channel

features.name: wide layout support
features.description: Full-width content layout option for documents
features.evidence_quote: create-note/update-note now support contentWidth for wide layouts.

differentiators: Document verification system with automated reminders keeps knowledge current
AI search (Ask) is permission-aware — only surfaces content the querying user can access
Ask is included in all paid plans at no extra cost
Knowledge Suite bundles Slite knowledge base with Super enterprise search at a discounted price
MCP support enables AI agents to read/write docs and manage channels natively
Skip the software learning curve: hassle-free adoption from day one
90% fewer repeated questions claimed by customers

recent_ships.what: Doc history rework: block-level diffs, word-level attribution to person/agent, minimap, floating footer bar
recent_ships.source: Changes are now highlighted at the block level and down to individual words, with clear attribution

recent_ships.what: Super enterprise search accessible inside Slite sidebar without switching apps
recent_ships.source: If your workspace has both Slite and Super, you can now use Super directly from the Slite sidebar

recent_ships.what: MCP hybrid format (SliteML + Markdown) for AI agents; read_range tool; wide layout support
recent_ships.source: Slite MCP now accepts operations in either standard Markdown or our rich SliteML format

recent_ships.what: SCIM provisioning GA for Enterprise (Okta first; Azure AD and Google Workspace coming)
recent_ships.source: SCIM provisioning is now available for all Enterprise plan customers. Starting with Okta

recent_ships.what: Silent sharing: share a doc without notifying recipients
recent_ships.source: You can share a doc without notifying recipients.

recent_ships.what: Boxed layout redesign with unified sidebar shell across Slite and Super
recent_ships.source: The main content area now sits in a white box surrounded by lighter sidebars

recent_ships.what: Comments redesign: doc-order display, Unread tab, highlighted-text email notifications, access warning on @mention
recent_ships.source: Comments now appear in document order. A new Unread tab makes it easy to catch up.

recent_ships.what: MCP comment creation and channel management tools added
recent_ships.source: Create and reply to comment threads directly via MCP… Two new channel tools: create-channel and update-channel

praised: "The editing interface and document structure are SO simple and useful. It's been the best Knowledge Base experience we've had." — Martijn Hazelaar, CTO at Flexdealer
"I can't imagine dealing with all the content we've produced without the Knowledge Management Panel anymore. It's a life-saver." — Roman Kuba, VP Engineering at Tset
"Since we implemented Ask, that amount of questions has been divided by 10" — Alexis Dupont, Agorapulse
"Ask has been incredible, it's simplified information gathering for the whole team. We've eliminated the endless 'How does X work' messages." — Claire Villet, Displayce
Ease of adoption and onboarding speed praised across multiple testimonials
Support team responsiveness praised repeatedly on pricing page
4.7/5 on G2 Crowd and Capterra; 4.9/5 on ProductHunt
complaints: No explicit complaint data available from the provided sources (G2 page was inaccessible)

free_tier.limits: 14-day free trial of Standard plan only; no permanent free tier

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI search (Ask, 30 q/user/mo), doc verification, KM panel, analytics, integrations, 5GB storage/user

tiers.name: Knowledge Suite
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in Standard + OpenID SSO, SCIM, custom domain, Super enterprise search, 10GB storage/user; min 10 users

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Everything in KS + workspace-level reader role, audit logs, HIPAA, SLA, dedicated AM, personalized onboarding

pricing.notes: Knowledge Suite requires minimum 10 users. All plans billed yearly only (no monthly pricing shown). AI answers capped at 30/user/mo (Standard) and 100/user/mo (Knowledge Suite); custom on Enterprise. AI editor assistant capped at 50 responses/user/mo on Standard. File uploads capped at 200MB/file on Standard, unlimited on KS+. Attachment storage 5GB/user (Standard) vs 10GB/user (KS+). Enterprise Search included in Knowledge Suite; optional add-on on Enterprise. SCIM provisioning available only on Enterprise.
